q-import { q-components.qhtml } onReady { var host = this; if (!host || host.__qbuilderPageEditWired) { return; } host.__qbuilderPageEditWired = true; var initialMode = "0"; try { initialMode = typeof getBuilderConfig === "function" ? String(getBuilderConfig("edit_mode") || "").trim() : "0"; } catch (ignoredInitialMode) { initialMode = "0"; } host.setAttribute("data-page-edit-mode", initialMode === "1" ? "1" : "0"); try { var runtimeBuilder = host.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']"); if (runtimeBuilder) { if (typeof runtimeBuilder.enabled !== "undefined") { runtimeBuilder.enabled = initialMode === "1"; } else if (typeof qbuilder !== "undefined" && qbuilder && typeof qbuilder.inspect === "function") { qbuilder.inspect(host, initialMode === "1"); } } } catch (ignoredBuilderInit) { } } q-component nav-bar { w3-black,w3-center { w3-bar-item,w3-btn,w3-hover-grey { slot { nav-items } } } } q-template q-input-with-label { div { span.w3-label { slot { label } } slot { input-element } } } q-macro quick-note { slot { message } return { p.w3-small.w3-text-blue { text { ${message} } } } } q-color-schema { area { panel-background panel-foreground panel-border } panel-background { background-color } panel-foreground { color } panel-border { border-color } } q-color-theme panel { panel-background: #182A21, panel-foreground: #F5FFF9, panel-border: #2A5A49 } q-component toggle-builder-button { q-signal toggleBuilder() onReady { try { this.style.display = "contents"; } catch (ignoredDisplay) { } } function toggle() { try { this.toggleBuilder(); } catch (evt) { try { console.log("Cannot emit toggleBuilder signal", evt); } catch (ignoredLog) { } } } li { id: "toggle-editor" data-page-edit-toggle: "1" class: q-bind { var mode = typeof getBuilderConfig === "function" ? String(getBuilderConfig("edit_mode") || "").trim() : "0"; return mode === "1" ? "w3-button w3-green" : "w3-button w3-orange"; } content: q-bind { var mode = typeof getBuilderConfig === "function" ? String(getBuilderConfig("edit_mode") || "").trim() : "0"; return mode === "1" ? "Edit Mode: ON" : "Edit Mode: OFF"; } onclick { try { this.component.toggle(); var host = this.closest("q-html"); var builder = host && host.querySelector ? host.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']") : null; var active = builder && builder.enabled ? "1" : "0"; if (typeof setBuilderConfig === "function") { setBuilderConfig("edit-mode", active); } if (host && typeof host.setAttribute === "function") { host.setAttribute("data-page-edit-mode", active); } this.setAttribute("class", active === "1" ? "w3-button w3-green" : "w3-button w3-orange"); this.textContent = active === "1" ? "Edit Mode: ON" : "Edit Mode: OFF"; } catch (evt) { try { console.log("Cannot toggle builder", evt); } catch (ignoredLog) { } } } } } q-builder { id: "page-builder" q-builder-runtime: "1" } div.w3-black.w3-text-white.w3-bar, nav-bar { li { html { top-item 1 } } li { html { top-item 2 } } li { html { top-item 3 } } } div.w3-container.w3-title.w3-header.w3-xlarge.w3-green { html { Hello world } } quick-note { message { q-macro is active in test.html } } div.w3-container.w3-margin-top { panel { panel-border: #9A7EF7 } div#qcolor-demo.w3-padding.w3-round-large.w3-border { q-color { panel-background panel-foreground panel-border } h4 { text { q-color demo } } p { text { q-color-schema + q-color-theme + q-color are active. } } } } div.w3-threequarter.w3-light-grey,q-tabs { id: "demo-tabs" q-tab.w3-light-grey { name { text { Sign-in } } content { div.w3-light-grey { h3 { text { Sign-in } } q-form { q-input-with-label { label { text { username } } input-element { input.w3-input.w3-border.w3-round-large.w3-margin-bottom { id: "signin-username" name: "username" autocomplete: "username" } } } q-input-with-label { label { text { password } } input-element { input.w3-input.w3-border.w3-round-large.w3-margin-bottom { id: "signin-password" type: "password" name: "password" autocomplete: "current-password" } } } q-input-with-label { label { text { Remember Me } } input-element { input { id: "signin-remember" type: "checkbox" name: "remember" text { Remember me } } } } center,q-input-with-label { label { } input-element { button.w3-btn { text { Submit } } } } } } } } q-tab { name { text { Details } } content { div.w3-light-grey { h3 { text { Details } } p { text { This is the second tab. } } } } } q-tab { name { text { Contact } } content { div { h3 { text { Contact } } p { text { This is the third tab. } } } } } } div.w3-quarter.w3-nav.w3-col.w3-right.w3-padding { ul.w3-list.w3-block { li.w3-bar.w3-green.w3-bar-item { html { navigation } } nav-bar { w3-bar { li { html { right-item 1 } } li { html { right-item 2 } } li { html { right-item 3 } } li.w3-button.w3-blue { text { Show Tab 2 } onclick { document.querySelector("#demo-tabs").show(1); } } toggle-builder-button { onReady { try { var host = this.closest ? this.closest("q-html") : null; var builder = host && host.querySelector ? host.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']") : null; if (!builder && typeof document !== "undefined" && document && document.querySelector) { builder = document.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']"); } if (builder && typeof builder.toggle === "function" && this.toggleBuilder && typeof this.toggleBuilder.connect === "function") { this.toggleBuilder.connect(builder.toggle); this.setAttribute("data-toggle-connected", "1"); } else { this.setAttribute("data-toggle-connected", "0"); } } catch (evt) { try { console.log("Cannot connect toggle-builder-button", evt); } catch (ignoredLog) { } } } } } } } }
